diary.placeholder: Tap here and pour your thoughts...
diary.empty: No entries yet. Write your first thought!
diary.error.emptyInput: Feelio is listening... write at least one thought!
diary.error.loadFailed: Could not load your journal entries.
diary.error.saveFailed: Oops! Your thought could not be saved.
diary.question.1: What are you grateful for today?
diary.question.2: What did you learn about yourself today?
diary.question.3: What joyful moment did you have in the last 24 hours?
diary.question.4: What did you do to take care of your body today?
diary.question.5: What is one small goal for tomorrow?
diary.question.7: What did you feel right now when opening the journal?
diary.question.8: What is one thing you want to do more often?
diary.question.9: What helps you feel calm this period?
diary.question.10: What would you appreciate if it happened tomorrow?
map.title: Explore
album.empty: Explore the city and check in at a location to add memories here! 🐼
wellbeing.challenge.fizic.1: Drink a big glass of water right now.
wellbeing.challenge.fizic.2: Stretch your back and arms for 2 minutes.
wellbeing.challenge.fizic.4: Walk around the house or outside for 5 minutes.
wellbeing.challenge.fizic.5: Play your favorite song and dance to it!
wellbeing.challenge.fizic.7: Tidy up your desk or a small drawer.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.1: Take 5 deep breaths, slowly in and out.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.2: Smile at yourself in the mirror for 10 seconds.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.3: Drink tea or warm water in small sips.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.4: Sit in complete silence for 3 minutes.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.5: Look out the window and notice 3 beautiful things.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.6: Turn off all screens for 20 minutes.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.7: Write down 3 things that make you happy.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.8: Light a candle or use a scent you enjoy.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.9: Listen to nature sounds for 10 minutes.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.10: Take a relaxing shower or bath without rushing.
wellbeing.challenge.creativ.1: Draw a sun or a flower on a sheet of paper.
wellbeing.challenge.creativ.2: Think of a new name for an imaginary animal.
wellbeing.challenge.creativ.3: Take an artistic photo of an object in your room.
wellbeing.challenge.creativ.4: Write one sentence describing how you feel today.
wellbeing.challenge.creativ.5: Hum a made-up melody right now.
wellbeing.challenge.creativ.6: Draw a funny self-portrait in 2 minutes.
wellbeing.challenge.creativ.8: Learn how to say "Thank you" in 3 languages.
wellbeing.challenge.creativ.9: Write a kind message to your future self.
wellbeing.challenge.creativ.10: Eat something in a way that's different from usual.
wellbeing.challenge.social.1: Wave to a neighbor or smile at someone on the street.
wellbeing.challenge.social.2: Send a quick "Hi" message to a friend.
wellbeing.challenge.social.3: Give a like or positive feedback to 3 posts.
wellbeing.challenge.social.4: Tell a joke to someone at home or by message.
wellbeing.challenge.social.5: Call a family member for 2 minutes.
wellbeing.challenge.social.6: Give someone a sincere compliment today.
wellbeing.challenge.social.7: Help someone with a small task (e.g. wash a dish).
wellbeing.challenge.social.8: Tell someone "I appreciate having you in my life."
wellbeing.challenge.social.9: Send a funny meme to your friends.
wellbeing.challenge.social.10: Forgive yourself for one small mistake today.
wellbeing.challenge.fizic.11: Walk up and down the stairs twice.
wellbeing.challenge.fizic.12: Balance on one foot for 30 seconds, then switch.
wellbeing.challenge.fizic.14: Drink water and refill your bottle for later.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.11: Stretch and yawn on purpose three times.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.12: Drink a glass of water slowly, noticing each sip.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.13: Massage your shoulders and neck for 1 minute.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.14: Write down one thing you're grateful for.
wellbeing.challenge.relaxare.15: Close your eyes and listen to your breathing for 1 minute.
wellbeing.challenge.creativ.12: Make up a short story about a cloud.
wellbeing.challenge.creativ.13: Draw with your eyes closed for 1 minute.
wellbeing.challenge.creativ.14: Take a photo of something colorful around you.
wellbeing.challenge.creativ.15: Build something small from objects on your desk.
wellbeing.challenge.social.11: Sincerely thank someone for something today.
wellbeing.challenge.social.12: Ask a friend how they're really feeling.
wellbeing.challenge.social.13: Leave a kind comment for someone online.
wellbeing.challenge.social.14: Recommend a book or movie to a friend.
wellbeing.challenge.social.15: Say hi to someone you usually overlook.
stats.calcNote.week: Daily completion across the last 7 days.
stats.calcNote.month: Daily completion across the calendar month.
stats.calcNote.year: Monthly average completion (missing days count as 0).
